headline: Standardizing Visual Tokens for Autonomous Coding Agents
lede: The DESIGN.md specification creates a unified contract between design intent and machine execution. By blending YAML-defined tokens with markdown rationale, this framework allows agents to render brand-compliant interfaces with unprecedented precision.

headline: Automating Cinematic Content Production with OpenMontage
lede: OpenMontage orchestrates hundreds of specialized agent skills to transform narrative requests into fully edited video compositions. This pipeline streamlines asset sourcing and frame validation, turning local compute into a professional-grade studio environment.

headline: Applying Adversarial Investment Research to AI Portfolios
lede: AI Berkshire leverages multi-agent adversarial workflows to strip bias from financial decision-making. By forcing conflicting viewpoints to reconcile, the system ensures that automated investment research remains grounded in audited, repeatable logic.

headline: Self-Hosting Travel Orchestration with TREK
lede: TREK provides a private, centralized hub for managing itineraries and sensitive travel data without relying on external cloud silos. The platform combines modular planning tools with modern authentication, ensuring your vacation infrastructure remains entirely under your control.

headline: Native Linux Container Execution on Apple Silicon
lede: This specialized tool bridges the gap between OCI-compliant containers and Apple's native virtualization framework. By running Linux workloads directly on local hardware, it delivers the high-performance throughput required for modern container development.

headline: Reverse-Engineering Legacy Sites into Next.js Codebases
lede: The AI Website Cloner Template enables the automated conversion of static design assets into robust React components. By extracting tokens and generating precise specifications, it helps teams rapidly modernize legacy infrastructure.

headline: Scaling Engineering Output with Structured Agent Roles
lede: gstack implements an opinionated framework that assigns specific engineering roles to AI models. This modular architecture standardizes the software development lifecycle, transforming generic coding agents into a cohesive, high-velocity virtual team.

headline: Automating AWS Resource Management with MCP Integration
lede: The Agent Toolkit for AWS connects coding agents directly to cloud environments via secure, context-aware protocols. This infrastructure provides the necessary IAM controls and API coverage to manage complex deployments through automated reasoning.

headline: Codifying Cybersecurity Playbooks for AI Operatives
lede: This extensive library maps hundreds of security skills to industry-standard frameworks like NIST and MITRE. It transforms LLMs into capable defensive analysts by providing verifiable, audit-ready procedures for incident response.

headline: Controlling Web Interfaces with Lightweight JavaScript Agents
lede: Page Agent enables direct natural language control over DOM elements without the overhead of headless browsers or external proxies. By utilizing in-page execution, it provides an efficient, low-latency method for automating complex SaaS workflows.
